ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-04-2022 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Apr-04-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-28-2022 Continued To Apr-04-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. An Order to Appear will be issued to Executor Daniel Mui and Attorney Lillian Ng to appear on Apr-04-2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration have not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Hon. Ronald Quidachay. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: G. Bastain. Not reported.
Off Calendar Jan-24-2022 Continued To Feb-28-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Approving Settlement Agreement And Mutual Release And Consolidating Hearing Dates
Off Calendar Jul-02-2020 Advanced From Oct-07-20 To Jul-13-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Jul-23-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lillian Ng appeared by telephone for Daniel Mui (Executor).
Edward Koplowitz appeared by telephone for Daniel Mui (Beneficiary).
Tracy Potts appeared by telephone for Interpro/GenStar International.

The Court questions whether notice was given to the 18 heirs and to the charities. Mr. Koplowitz stated that notice was provided to all parties, that there are waivers of notice by the individual heirs, that the charities are unaffected by the settlement and that the charities will each receive $5,000.00 from the estate. Ms. Potts stated that all of the heirs signed the settlement agreement consenting to this day. The Court raised the issue of language in the settlement agreement not indicating and making it clear that the funds are not to come out of the estate, that Mr. Mui will be paying the settlement personally and that it is Mr. Mui's obligation to pay the parties. Ms. Ng stated that her Client (Mr. Mui) understands that the $300,000.00 will come from him. Mr. Koplowitz stated that the parties are aware that the funds will go into the Attorney Client Trust Account. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary filed by Mr. Mui (subject to review of the order). The issue of whether a bond will be ordered, and the amount of bond is to be determined. Status on close of estate is set for January 24, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court granted the Petition for Order Approving Settlement Agreement, etc. (subject to review of the order). The Petition for Letters of Administration filed by GenStar International is off calendar.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Cabasares. Not reported.

Off Calendar Feb-10-2020 Continued To Feb-24-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Ed Koplowitz and Lillian Ng for and with Daniel Mui (beneficiary and petitioner).
Tracy Potts for Gen Star International (interested party) via Court Call.

Ms. Potts stated she was trying to get the same court date of Feb 24, 2020, that File and Serve Xpress has been down, and would like to file a petition and objections. Mr. Koplowitz stated there is no urgency, that everything is stable, and request court to enter an order that Ms. Pott's petition for special administration be heard at the same date and time as Daniel Mui's ex parte petition. The Court noted that Ms. Potts should make reservation request with the clerk's office to set her ex parte for the same date.

Cynthia Sullivan's Petition for Letters of Administration is Off Calendar.

Daniel Mui's Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to February 24, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for update on status of dates.

Judge: Joeseph M. Quinn. Clerk: S. Le. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Matter not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Feb-10-2020 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Nov-25-2019 Continued To Feb-10-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: David Sauers for and with Cynthia Sullivan (Petitioner).
Edward Koplowitz for and with Daniel Mui (Beneficiary).
Lillian Ng for and with Daniel Mui (Executor).

Discussion was held regarding whether or not the Parties will participate in mediation, the scope of discovery that will be required, whether or not the matter is ready to be heard today, who the witnesses will be, the estate planning Attorney refusing to provide a declaration, trial setting, etc. Mr. Sauers stated that he is requesting an evidentiary hearing. For the purpose of the trial, Mr. Sauers stipulates that the declarations that have been put in by Mr. Koplowitz are accepted as authentic and admissible. The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than January 24, 2020. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by January 31, 2020. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary and the Petition for Letters of Administration are continued to and the Parties are to return on February 10, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation. A status conference statement is to be filed by January 31, 2020. Mr. Koplowitz stated that there are a number of persons that appear to be intestate heirs and that they will give notice to them, but that they cannot guarantee that they will come to the mediation.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.
